title: Polly with a Past
writer: George Middleton, Guy Bolton, June Mathis
actors: Ina Claire, Ralph Graves, Marie Wainwright
plot: Wealthy young Rex Van Zile is madly in love with pretty Myrtle Davis, but she is so absorbed in the task she has taken on to herself of reforming Skid-Row derelicts that she pays no attention to Rex's affections. Dejected, he comm...
